diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -58,7 +58,10 @@
     model_name = ckpt.get('args', {}).get('model_name', 'openai/clip-vit-base-patch16')

 

     model = CLIPClassifier(num_classes=182, model_name=model_name)

-    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

+    state_dict = ckpt['model_state_dict']

+    # Strip module prefix if checkpoint was saved from DDP/DataParallel

+    new_state_dict = {k[7:] if k.startswith('module.') else k: v for k, v in state_dict.items()}

+    model.load_state_dict(new_state_dict)

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()
